name: TE — lexprune (recall-safe: equal recall, fewer tokens)
description: Forks ptv-lex-weighted's full pipeline, tightens pathsToRoot to maxPathsPerType=2/maxDepth=5, and after selection drops any coord whose blended cosine is below dropFloor unless the coord is a root field, lies on a kept path-to-root, or its parent type is one of the top-K (completeTopK) retrieved types. A gentle relevance-floor prune that sheds the low-cos splice tail at near-baseline recall.
